text:
LONG NAME: ALOWD_SRVC_QTY 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP line 
LT line 
OT line 
VALUES: 
Valid numeric value, three decimal places; may be negative. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
When HCPCS codes are required for services, the units are equal to the number of times the 
procedure/service being reported was performed. 
^ Back to TOC ^
